mapper.insert: insert into evaluation (appointment_id, patient_id, doctor_id, schedule_id, score, content, is_anonymous, status) values (#{appointmentId}, #{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{scheduleId}, #{score}, #{content}, #{isAnonymous}, 1 /*默认已发布*/)
mapper.select: select e.doctor_id as doctorId, d.name as doctorName, dept.name as departmentName, t.name as titleName, da.avatar as avatar, round(avg(e.score * pow(0.98, datediff(now(), e.created_at))), 2) as hotScore, count(*) as evaluationCount from evaluation e inner join doctor d on e.doctor_id = d.id left join department dept on d.department_id = dept.id left join title t on d.title_id = t.id left join doctor_audit da on d.id = da.doctor_id where e.status = 1 and e.created_at > DATE_SUB(now(), interval 30 day) group by e.doctor_id, d.name, dept.name, t.name, da.avatar order by hotScore desc limit #{limit}

select e.id as evaluationId, e.doctor_id as doctorId, d.name as doctorName, dept.name as departmentName, e.score, e.content, e.is_anonymous = 1 as isAnonymous, e.status, e.created_at as createdAt from evaluation e inner join doctor d on e.doctor_id = d.id left join department dept on d.department_id = dept.id where e.patient_id = #{patientId} order by e.created_at desc

select e.id as evaluationId, e.doctor_id as doctorId, d.name as doctorName, dept.name as departmentName, s.schedule_date as scheduleDate, e.score, e.content, case when e.is_anonymous = 1 then 1 else 0 end as isAnonymous, e.created_at as createdAt from evaluation e inner join doctor d on e.doctor_id = d.id left join department dept on d.department_id = dept.id left join schedule s on e.schedule_id = s.id where e.doctor_id = #{doctorId} and e.status = 1 order by e.created_at desc
